findingDetails.title: Remediation phase is marked complete while retaining scaffold placeholders
findingDetails.claim: The remediation phase presents itself as complete while core scope, handoff, problem, requirements, and phase criteria remain placeholders or pending.
findingDetails.recommendation: Downgrade the phase status or replace placeholders with real remediation scope, requirements, and handoff evidence before treating phase 009 as closed.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.

noveltyJustification: New active finding emitted with evidence.

budgetProfile.actualMode: lineage synthesis with source reads and focused test run

findingDetails.title: Fan-out lineage session id is discarded during review init
findingDetails.claim: The fan-out runner passes a concrete session_id to the lineage prompt, but review init writes config, JSONL, and registry sessionId fields from ISO_8601_NOW instead of the supplied lineage id.
findingDetails.recommendation: Bind the supplied session_id into review init and reuse it across config, state, registry, graph convergence, blocked-stop, and synthesis events.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.

noveltyJustification: New active finding emitted with evidence.

budgetProfile.actualMode: lineage synthesis with source reads and focused test run

focus: CLI prompt versus LEAF agent contract

findingDetails.title: CLI fan-out prompt names the LEAF deep-review agent and asks it to run the full loop
findingDetails.claim: The generated CLI lineage prompt says the subprocess is a deep-review agent and instructs it to run phase_init, phase_main_loop, and phase_synthesis, contradicting the deep-review agent contract that it executes exactly one iteration and must not run the full loop.
findingDetails.recommendation: Render CLI lineage prompts as command-host/orchestrator prompts, or invoke the deep/review command surface directly, so LEAF-only agent instructions do not conflict with full-loop phase execution.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.

results.summary: Phase metadata and shipped state are not reconciled.

noveltyJustification: New active finding emitted with evidence.

budgetProfile.actualMode: lineage synthesis with source reads and focused test run

focus: Focused fan-out verification and native pool behavior

findingDetails.title: Focused fan-out regression suite fails after native lineages were folded into the pool
findingDetails.claim: The checked-in fanout-run tests still expect native-only configurations to produce no CLI lineage work, while the implementation now assigns all lineages to the pool, and the focused vitest run fails 3 tests.
findingDetails.recommendation: Either update the native-only tests to the new pool-owned native behavior with a native/opencode stub, or restore a true no-CLI branch; keep the prompt wording assertion synchronized with the current legal-convergence phrase.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.

results.summary: Phase metadata and shipped state are not reconciled.

noveltyJustification: New active finding emitted with evidence.

budgetProfile.actualMode: lineage synthesis with source reads and focused test run

findingDetails.title: Workflow YAML carries ephemeral finding-id comments
findingDetails.claim: The review workflow embeds an ephemeral finding id in comments, which violates the active comment-hygiene rule that forbids artifact/finding identifiers in durable code or workflow comments.
findingDetails.recommendation: Remove the finding-id marker and keep only the durable rationale for honoring the parsed resource-map flag.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Finding is within the declared spec-folder / deep-loop orchestration review scope.
